add-text-to-pdf-page-at-specific-coordin.title: Add Text to PDF Page at Specific Coordinates
add-text-to-pdf-page-at-specific-coordin.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a TextFragment, set its position using X/Y coordinates, and save the modified document with Aspose.Pdf.

insert-same-text-on-all-pdf-pages.title: Insert Same Text on All PDF Pages
insert-same-text-on-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating through each page, and adding an identical plain‑text fragment at a specified position on every page before saving the document.

load-custom-ttf-font-from-memory.title: Load Custom TrueType Font from Memory Stream and Apply to PDF Text
load-custom-ttf-font-from-memory.description: Demonstrates how to load a TrueType font from a memory stream, embed it in a PDF, and use it with a TextFragment's TextState for rendering custom text.

apply-custom-otf-font-to-textfragment.title: Apply Custom OTF Font to TextFragment
apply-custom-otf-font-to-textfragment.description: Demonstrates loading an OpenType (OTF) font, embedding it, and applying it to a TextFragment to create styled text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-character-spacing-pdf.title: Set Character Spacing for Text in PDF
set-character-spacing-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to adjust inter‑character gaps by setting the CharacterSpacing property on a TextState before adding a TextFragment to a PDF page.

left-align-text-in-pdf.title: Left Align Text in PDF
left-align-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add a text fragment to a PDF document and align it to the left margin using Aspose.Pdf's TextState.HorizontalAlignment property.

center-text-on-pdf-page.title: Center Text on PDF Page
center-text-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to center‑align a text fragment on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting TextState.HorizontalAlignment to Center.

right-align-text-pdf.title: Right Align Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
right-align-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to right‑align a text fragment on a PDF page by setting the TextState.HorizontalAlignment property and saving the modified document.

add-multi-line-text-paragraph.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Paragraph to PDF Page
add-multi-line-text-paragraph.description: Demonstrates creating a TextParagraph, configuring its rectangle, wrap mode, alignment, and margins, adding multiple lines, and appending it to a PDF page using TextBuilder before saving the document.

add-clickable-hyperlink-to-pdf-text.title: Add Clickable Hyperlink to PDF Text
add-clickable-hyperlink-to-pdf-text.description: Shows how to insert a clickable hyperlink into a PDF by creating a TextFragment, adding a TextSegment with a WebHyperlink, and saving the modified document.

add-html-fragment-to-pdf.title: Add HTML Fragment with Styled Text to PDF
add-html-fragment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a styled HTML fragment into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlFragment and customize its TextState (font, size, color).

create-footnote-with-image.title: Create Footnote with Image in PDF
create-footnote-with-image.description: Demonstrates how to add a footnote to a PDF page and insert an in‑memory PNG image into the footnote's Paragraphs collection using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-to-footnote-in-pdf.title: Add Table to Footnote in PDF
add-table-to-footnote-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a footnote for a text fragment and populate it with a table using Aspose.Pdf.

create-endnote-bold-italic.title: Create Endnote with Bold and Italic Text in PDF
create-endnote-bold-italic.description: Demonstrates how to add an endnote to a PDF and format its text using TextState to apply bold and italic styles.

show-floating-box-on-button-hover.title: Show Floating Box on Button Hover using HideAction
show-floating-box-on-button-hover.description: Demonstrates how to display a floating annotation when the mouse enters a button and hide it on exit by assigning HideAction to the button's OnEnter and OnExit events.

find-specific-phrase-in-pdf.title: Find Specific Phrase in PDF Using TextFragmentAbsorber
find-specific-phrase-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber to locate and list all occurrences of a given phrase within a PDF document.

replace-text-pdf-preserve-formatting.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-text-pdf-preserve-formatting.description: Demonstrates how to search for a specific phrase in a PDF, replace it with a new phrase, and keep the original font, size, color, and other formatting using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Header to All PDF Pages
add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to loop through a PDF's Pages collection and attach the same header text to each page using HeaderFooter and TextFragment.

add-footer-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Footer Page Numbers to PDF
add-footer-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a footer containing page numbers on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent text watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextStamp and TextState.

rotate-text-in-pdf.title: Rotate Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
rotate-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and rotate it by setting the TextState.Rotation property before saving the document.

apply-background-color-to-text.title: Apply Background Color to Text in PDF
apply-background-color-to-text.description: Demonstrates how to set a background color on a TextFragment's TextState before adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

style-textfragment-font-size-color.title: Style TextFragment with Font Size and Color
style-textfragment-font-size-color.description: Demonstrates how to define font size, color, and font for a TextFragment by using its TextState property and add it to a PDF page.

add-text-to-pdf-from-memory-stream.title: Add Text to PDF from Memory Stream
add-text-to-pdf-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a Stream, inserting a text fragment on the first page, and returning the modified PDF as a new MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.

save-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Save PDF to Byte Array
save-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, optionally applies modifications, and returns the saved PDF as a byte array using a memory stream.

add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.title: Add Text and Encrypt PDF with Password
add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a red text fragment, sets specific permissions, encrypts the document with user and owner passwords using AES‑256, and saves the protected file.

add-underlined-text-to-pdf.title: Add Underlined Text to PDF
add-underlined-text-to-pdf.description: Creates a PDF document and inserts a text fragment with underlining by setting the TextState.Underline property using Aspose.Pdf.

create-strikethrough-text.title: Create Strikethrough Text in PDF
create-strikethrough-text.description: Shows how to apply strikeout formatting to a TextFragment using the TextState property and save the result as a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

render-superscript-text.title: Render Superscript Text Using Text Rise
render-superscript-text.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF and adding superscript characters by setting a positive TextRise value with the SetTextRise operator, then resetting it to baseline.

render-subscript-text.title: Render Subscript Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
render-subscript-text.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding normal and subscript characters by enabling TextState.Subscript (negative rise) on a TextFragment, and saving the document.

set-custom-line-spacing-pdf.title: Set Custom Line Spacing for Text in PDF
set-custom-line-spacing-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to adjust line spacing (leading) for added text by configuring TextState.LineSpacing and appending lines to a TextParagraph.

adjust-word-spacing-inserted-text.title: Adjust Word Spacing of Inserted Text in PDF
adjust-word-spacing-inserted-text.description: Shows how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and customize the spacing between words using the TextState.WordSpacing property.

justify-text-in-pdf.title: Justify Text in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
justify-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to justify a text fragment across the full page width by setting the TextState.HorizontalAlignment property to Justify and adding the fragment to a PDF page.

enable-rtl-text-direction.title: Enable Right-to-Left Text Direction in PDF
enable-rtl-text-direction.description: Shows how to set a PDF's reading order to right‑to‑left and add Arabic text using Aspose.Pdf's document, text fragment, and text builder APIs.

add-arabic-bidi-text-to-pdf.title: Add Arabic Bidirectional Text to PDF
add-arabic-bidi-text-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert right‑to‑left Arabic text into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf, relying on Unicode directionality for proper rendering.

set-custom-line-height-pdf-text.title: Set Custom Line Height for PDF Text
set-custom-line-height-pdf-text.description: Demonstrates how to assign a custom line height (line spacing) to a TextFragment by configuring its TextState before adding it to a PDF page.

enable-kerning-in-pdf-text.title: Enable Kerning in PDF Text Using TextFragment
enable-kerning-in-pdf-text.description: Shows how to add a TextFragment to a PDF document and adjust character spacing to emulate kerning between characters.

add-text-with-font-settings-to-pdf.title: Add Text with Font Settings to PDF
add-text-with-font-settings-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a page, insert a TextFragment, configure its font, size, and color via TextState, and save the document.

enable-automatic-hyphenation.title: Enable Automatic Hyphenation for Long Words in PDF
enable-automatic-hyphenation.description: Shows how to turn on automatic hyphenation for long words by configuring TextParagraph's formatting options and inserting the paragraph into a PDF page.

embed-css-in-htmlfragment.title: Embed CSS in HtmlFragment for Styled PDF Text
embed-css-in-htmlfragment.description: Shows how to embed CSS rules inside an HtmlFragment to control font, color, margins, and line spacing when converting HTML to PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

create-internal-text-link-to-page.title: Create Internal Text Link to Specific Page in PDF
create-internal-text-link-to-page.description: Shows how to add a clickable TextFragment that navigates to a given page within the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf's LocalHyperlink.

add-clickable-hyperlink-text-to-pdf.title: Add Clickable Hyperlink Text to PDF
add-clickable-hyperlink-text-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a text fragment with a clickable segment that opens a web URL using Aspose.Pdf.

launch-action-open-external-file.title: Create Launch Action Link to Open External File
launch-action-open-external-file.description: Demonstrates how to add a clickable text element to a PDF that launches an external file using Aspose.Pdf's LaunchAction.

rotate-specific-text-fragment.title: Rotate Specific Text Fragment in PDF
rotate-specific-text-fragment.description: Loads a PDF, searches for a given text string on a page, rotates the first matching text fragment by 45 degrees, and saves the modified document.

insert-rotated-text-on-second-page.title: Insert Rotated Text on Second PDF Page
insert-rotated-text-on-second-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to add a rotated TextFragment to the second page of an existing PDF document.

create-rotated-text-paragraph.title: Create Rotated Text Paragraph with Multiple Fragments
create-rotated-text-paragraph.description: Shows how to build a TextParagraph containing several TextFragments, apply a 30‑degree rotation, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
replace-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to locate a specific phrase in a PDF document and replace it with another string using Aspose.Pdf's text search and replacement APIs.

extract-email-addresses-from-pdf.title: Extract Email Addresses from PDF Using Regex
extract-email-addresses-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search each page of a PDF for email addresses using a regular expression with Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and collect the matches.

identify-forced-line-breaks-in-textfragm.title: Identify Forced Line Breaks in TextFragment
identify-forced-line-breaks-in-textfragm.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's TextFragment paragraphs, splits the fragment text into logical lines, and determines whether each line ends with a forced line‑break for custom layout processing.

retrieve-line-break-info-from-text-fragm.title: Retrieve Line Break Information from Text Fragments
retrieve-line-break-info-from-text-fragm.description: Loads a PDF, extracts text fragments from the first page, and uses reflection to call GetLineBreakInfo on each fragment, logging the results to the console.

append-disclaimer-to-first-pdf-page.title: Append Disclaimer Text to First PDF Page
append-disclaimer-to-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a disclaimer as a TextFragment to the end of the paragraph collection on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-header-text-pdf.title: Rotate Header Text in PDFs by 90 Degrees
rotate-header-text-pdf.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, detects header text fragments using a font‑size heuristic, rotates those fragments 90° and saves the updated PDFs to an output directory.

replace-text-rotate-pdf-pages-save-memor.title: Replace Text and Rotate PDF Pages, Save to MemoryStream
replace-text-rotate-pdf-pages-save-memor.description: The example loads a PDF, replaces all occurrences of a target string using TextFragmentAbsorber, rotates each page 90° clockwise, and saves the modified document into a MemoryStream (optionally writing it to a file).

search-pdf-text-log.title: Search PDF Text and Record Search Log
search-pdf-text-log.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, searching for a phrase using TextFragmentAbsorber with search options, optionally modifying found fragments, saving the document, and writing a log file with the search results and any extraction errors.

extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.title: Extract All Text from PDF and Save as UTF-8 File
extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the concatenated text from all pages using a TextAbsorber, and write the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

extract-line-break-positions-pdf.title: Extract Line‑Break Y Positions from PDF Text Fragments
extract-line-break-positions-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, extracts multi‑line text fragments, groups their segments by Y coordinate to determine line‑break positions, and writes the results to a JSON file.

add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Text Watermark to All PDF Pages
add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder and TextFragment to place a rotated "CONFIDENTIAL" watermark at the center of each page in a PDF document.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Pages
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to replace a given phrase only within a defined page range of a PDF by iterating pages and using Aspose.Pdf's text absorber.

highlight-keyword-in-pdf.title: Highlight Keyword in PDF (Case‑Insensitive)
highlight-keyword-in-pdf.description: Shows how to search a PDF for a case‑insensitive keyword using a regular expression and Aspose.Pdf, then highlight each found occurrence with a colored text fragment.

insert-rotated-mixed-style-text-paragrap.title: Insert Rotated Mixed-Style Text Paragraph on Third PDF Page
insert-rotated-mixed-style-text-paragrap.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextParagraph with bold and italic segments, rotates it 45°, and inserts it onto the third page.

batch-replace-text-in-pdfs.title: Batch Replace Text in PDFs Using Aspose.Pdf
batch-replace-text-in-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files and replace multiple strings with new values using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and a dictionary of replacement pairs.

extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.title: Extract Text and Count Words per PDF Page
extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text of each page using TextAbsorber, count the words, and output the page‑wise word counts to a CSV file.

rotate-draft-text-fragments.title: Rotate 'Draft' Text Fragments in PDF
rotate-draft-text-fragments.description: Shows how to locate all occurrences of the word "Draft" in a PDF and rotate those text fragments by 15 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.

find-dates-using-regex-in-pdf.title: Find Dates Using Regex in PDF
find-dates-using-regex-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate all dates in the format MM/DD/YYYY within a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber with a regular‑expression pattern.

append-multiline-textfragment-line-break.title: Append Multi-line TextFragment and Retrieve Line Break Information
append-multiline-textfragment-line-break.description: Demonstrates adding a multi-line TextFragment to a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf and extracting each line's break details via the generated TextSegments for custom rendering.

rotate-text-in-pdf-table-cell.title: Rotate Text in a PDF Table Cell
rotate-text-in-pdf-table-cell.description: Shows how to locate a table cell in a PDF, rotate its text fragment by 60 degrees using TextFragment.Rotation, and save the modified document.

rotate-pdf-title-text-45-degrees.title: Rotate PDF Title Text by 45 Degrees
rotate-pdf-title-text-45-degrees.description: Shows how to load PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, absorb all text fragments, rotate each fragment 45 degrees, and save the updated documents.

add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.title: Add Rotated Text to Bottom-Right Corner of Last PDF Page
add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to place a rotated text paragraph at the bottom‑right corner of the last page of a PDF document.

search-replace-text-with-hyperlink.title: Search and Replace Text with Clickable Hyperlink in PDF
search-replace-text-with-hyperlink.description: Demonstrates how to locate a specific phrase in a PDF, replace it with new text, and attach a clickable URL using a link annotation.

extract-pdf-text-sentences-to-pages.title: Extract PDF Text and Place Each Sentence on a Separate Page
extract-pdf-text-sentences-to-pages.description: Demonstrates how to extract all text from a PDF, split it into individual sentences using a regular expression, and write each sentence to its own page as a TextFragment.

rotate-text-field-appearance.title: Rotate Text Field Appearance in PDF
rotate-text-field-appearance.description: Shows how to rotate the appearance of a text box form field by adjusting its rectangle and updating the field's appearance stream, then saving the PDF.

batch-replace-text-pdf-config.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Using a Configuration File
batch-replace-text-pdf-config.description: Demonstrates how to load key‑value pairs from a config file and replace multiple text strings across all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

find-approximate-text-matches-pdf.title: Find Approximate Text Matches in PDF Using Fuzzy Regex
find-approximate-text-matches-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate approximate text occurrences in a PDF using a fuzzy regular‑expression pattern with TextFragmentAbsorber, and optionally highlight the matches.
